context: Average duration of exposure:   5 years Average duration of exposure:   11 years Average duration of exposure:   2 years Thermophilic actinomycetes: = bacteria < 1 µm in diameter with morphologic characteristics of fungi; found in soil, grains, compost, fresh water, forced-air heating, cooling system, humidifier, air- conditioning system Isocyanates:   used for large-scale production of polyurethane polymers in the manufacture of flexible / rigid foams, elastomers, glue, adhesives, surface coating, spray paint ◊  Principal cause of occupational asthma!
